description_long: This object is a rectangular glass display case with a metal frame and a solid base, commonly used for showcasing jewelry in urban retail environments. The upper section is enclosed with transparent glass panels, allowing clear visibility of the items inside while providing security. The interior is divided into several compartments, each lined with a patterned surface, likely for organizing and presenting individual jewelry pieces. The base is constructed from a combination of wood and metal, giving it a sturdy and elegant appearance. The overall design is functional yet refined, suitable for high-traffic areas such as jewelry stores or market stalls. The case is designed to be both visually appealing and protective for valuable items.
description: A rectangular glass and metal jewelry display case with a solid wood and metal base, featuring multiple interior compartments for organized presentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the glass display case, highlighting the transparent panels and compartmentalized interior.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the case and the thickness of the base, with the glass enclosure extending along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the glass panels and interior layout, but with less detail on the compartment dividers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the case's depth and the solid construction of the base.
